data.name: Hentai Tales: Master, Your Sex Class Begins Now
data.detailed_description:
遊戲玩法

享受撩人劇情同時挑戰燒腦謎題！
依照數字順序連線，填滿棋盤所有方塊
解開謎題即可解鎖煽情新插圖與後續劇情！
你能解開所有謎題，邂逅所有女孩嗎?!

故事背景

身為貴族繼承人，當忠誠的女僕們開始以親密方式傳授肉慾課程，我的教育頓時染上豔色。
我將掌控誘惑之術⋯⋯抑或沉溺於悖德深淵？

登場角色

霧谷雪野（女僕長）：

擁有T罩杯巨乳與母性氣質的端麗女性，隱藏著悖德秘密。
負責性愛調教的她，獨處時便撕下矜持假面，展露貪婪慾望。

星野美咲（辣妹女僕）：

頂著W罩杯曲線與染金秀髮的小惡魔，將挑逗視作遊戲。
俏皮笑聲下潛藏著渴望，欲讓嬌小主人親自「教導」何謂成熟。

遊戲特色

  • 20張美少女香豔情色插圖
  • 性格鮮明的女孩們交織的奇幻情色劇情
  • 可跳過解謎直接享受劇情（謎題進行中按下Enter鍵即可跳過）
  • CG鑑賞模式（解謎完成後點選CG左右按鈕切換）

data.name: Hentai Tales: Master, Your Sex Class Begins Now
data.detailed_description:
GamePlay

Enjoy a sensual story while completing tricky puzzles!
Connect the numbers sequentially, using all of the squares on the board
After completing a puzzle, you will unlock a sexy new image and the next part of the story!
Can you complete every puzzle and meet all of the girls?!

Story Background

As heir to a noble lineage, my education takes a scandalous turn when my devoted maids offer private lessons in carnal pleasures.
Will I master the art of seduction… or drown in decadence?

Characters

Kiritani Yukino (Head Maid):

A refined woman with maternal grace and T-cup breasts, Yukino hides a scandalous secret.
Tasked with my erotic education, her disciplined demeanor shatters when we’re alone—replaced by insatiable lust.

Misaki Hoshino (Gyaru Maid):

A bubbly, golden-haired tease with W-cup curves, Misaki treats seduction like a game.
Beneath her playful giggle lurks a need to be “taught” just how adult her tiny master really is.

Features

  • 20 sexy and erotic images of beautiful girls.
  • A fantastical erotic story with girls who have unique personalities.
  • You can skip the puzzles if you just want to enjoy the story. (Press Enter during a puzzle).
  • CG Gallery mode. (Click the left and right buttons next to the CG after completing a puzzle).
